message:
fix(ui): improve responsive layout and component polish

Refines core UI components with better responsive behavior, simplified
markup, and enhanced data visualization.

App.tsx Responsive Improvements:
- Add responsive sequence height using matchMedia for 900px breakpoint
  (360px on narrow screens, 480px on wider displays)
- Replace inline-styled glossary drawer with CSS class-based approach
  using .glossary-shell, .glossary-shell__header, .glossary-shell__body
- Add clickable backdrop button (.glossary-backdrop) for dismissing
  glossary on click outside
- Remove redundant GlossaryPanel import (use from barrel export)
- Pass height prop to SequenceView instead of className for dynamic sizing
- Remove duplicate beginner mode glossary drawer (consolidated into
  single glossary-shell implementation)
- Add beginner mode eyebrow label when active

PhageList Component Polish:
- Add 'panel' class for consistent styling with other panel components
- Reset padding to 0 on container (panel provides its own padding)
- Set height: 100% for proper flex container sizing
- Remove redundant inline border/backgroundColor styles (handled by CSS)

InfectionKineticsVisualizer Enhancements:
- Add metrics summary panel above canvas showing current Time, Bacteria,
  Infected, and Phage counts with color-coded values
- Display delta (Δ) for bacteria population change since simulation start
- Add formatDelta() helper for signed number formatting with k/M suffixes
- Wrap canvas in container div with .infection-viz class for styling
- Add ARIA labels for accessibility (role="img", aria-label)

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
